div.class: card-header bg-white py-3 border-bottom d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between flex-wrap gap-2

a.class: btn btn-sm btn-link text-danger p-0 ms-1
a.title: Clear filter

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary rounded-pill dropdown-toggle px-3

div.class: rounded-circle bg-light d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center flex-shrink-0

t.p: No students found for this country.
No students assigned to you yet.

div.class: d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between mb-4 flex-wrap gap-2

a.t-attf-class: btn btn-sm rounded-pill px-3 #{'' if not active_filter else 'btn-outline-'}secondary
btn btn-sm rounded-pill px-3 #{'' if not active_filter else 'btn-outline-'}secondary
btn btn-sm rounded-pill px-3 #{'' if not active_filter else 'btn-outline-'}secondary
btn btn-sm rounded-pill px-3 #{'' if not active_filter else 'btn-outline-'}secondary
btn btn-sm rounded-pill px-3 #{'' if not active_filter else 'btn-outline-'}secondary
btn btn-sm rounded-pill px-3 #{'' if active_filter == tab['key'] else 'btn-outline-'}#{tab['color']}
btn btn-sm rounded-pill px-3 #{'' if active_filter == tab['key'] else 'btn-outline-'}#{tab['color']}
btn btn-sm rounded-pill px-3 #{'' if active_filter == tab['key'] else 'btn-outline-'}#{tab['color']}
btn btn-sm rounded-pill px-3 #{'' if active_filter == tab['key'] else 'btn-outline-'}#{tab['color']}
btn btn-sm rounded-pill px-3 #{'' if active_filter == tab['key'] else 'btn-outline-'}#{tab['color']}

t.t-value: student.program_ids.filtered(lambda p: p.active).sorted(key=lambda p: ( (100 if (p.stage_code == 'visa_processing' and p.visa_state in ['approve', 'reject']) else 100 if p.stage_code == 'done' else 80 if (p.stage_code == 'visa_processing' and p.visa_state == 'apply') else 60 if (p.stage_code == 'final_offer' and p.final_offer_state == 'received') else 60 if p.stage_code == 'visa_documentation' else 40 if p.stage_code == 'final_offer' else 40 if p.stage_code == 'tuition_fee' else 40 if p.stage_code == 'gs_state' else 40 if p.stage_code == 'sponsor_document' else 40 if p.stage_code == 'offer_letter' else 40 if (p.stage_code == 'applied' and p.apply_state == 'submit') else 20 if p.stage_code == 'applied' else 20 if p.stage_code == 'confirmed' else 0) * 100 + (90 if p.stage_code == 'gs_state' and p.gs_state == 'approve' else 70 if p.stage_code == 'gs_state' and p.gs_state in ['revised', 'in_progress'] else 90 if p.stage_code == 'offer_letter' and p.offer_letter_state == 'accepted' else 70 if p.stage_code == 'offer_letter' and p.offer_letter_state == 'issued' else 90 if p.stage_code == 'tuition_fee' and p.tuition_fee_state == 'paid' else 90 if p.stage_code == 'applied' and p.apply_state == 'submit' else 50 if p.stage_code == 'applied' and p.apply_state == 'in_progress' else 0) ), reverse=True)[:1]

div.class: rounded-circle bg-light d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center flex-shrink-0
rounded-circle bg-light d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center flex-shrink-0
rounded-circle bg-light d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center flex-shrink-0
